'''loragaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:shadowish|shadowish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-r-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:shadowish|shadowish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| loragaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:loragithi|loragithi]] || [[word:loragiji|loragiji]] || [[word:loragishi|loragishi]] || [[word:loragiki|loragiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:loraguthuthu|loraguthuthu]] || [[word:loragujuju|loragujuju]] || [[word:loragushushu|loragushushu]] || [[word:loragukuku|loragukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:loraguthu|loraguthu]] || [[word:loraguju|loraguju]] || [[word:loragushu|loragushu]] || [[word:loraguku|loraguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:loragufthuf|loragufthuf]] || [[word:loragufjuf|loragufjuf]] || [[word:loragufshuf|loragufshuf]] || [[word:loragufkuf|loragufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:loragethe|loragethe]] || [[word:lorageje|lorageje]] || [[word:lorageshe|lorageshe]] || [[word:lorageke|lorageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:loragothotho|loragothotho]] || [[word:loragojojo|loragojojo]] || [[word:loragoshosho|loragoshosho]] || [[word:loragokoko|loragokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:loragotho|loragotho]] || [[word:loragojo|loragojo]] || [[word:loragosho|loragosho]] || [[word:loragoko|loragoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:loragofthof|loragofthof]] || [[word:loragofjof|loragofjof]] || [[word:loragofshof|loragofshof]] || [[word:loragofkof|loragofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:loragÃŸfthÃŸf|loragÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:loragÃŸfjÃŸf|loragÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:loragÃŸfshÃŸf|loragÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:loragÃŸfkÃŸf|loragÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:loragÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|loragÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:loragÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|loragÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:loragÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|loragÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:loragÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|loragÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:loragÃŸfthÃŸf|loragÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:loragÃŸfjÃŸf|loragÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:loragÃŸfshÃŸf|loragÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:loragÃŸfkÃŸf|loragÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:loragÃŸfthÃŸf|loragÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:loragÃŸfjÃŸf|loragÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:loragÃŸfshÃŸf|loragÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:loragÃŸfkÃŸf|loragÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:loragÃḊthÃḊ|loragÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:loragÃḊjÃḊ|loragÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:loragÃḊshÃḊ|loragÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:loragÃḊkÃḊ|loragÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:loragathatha|loragathatha]] || [[word:loragajaja|loragajaja]] || [[word:loragashasha|loragashasha]] || [[word:loragakaka|loragakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:loragatha|loragatha]] || [[word:loragaja|loragaja]] || [[word:loragasha|loragasha]] || [[word:loragaka|loragaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:loragafthaf|loragafthaf]] || [[word:loragafjaf|loragafjaf]] || [[word:loragafshaf|loragafshaf]] || [[word:loragafkaf|loragafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:loragasha|loragasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:loragshÃḋsha|loragshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:loragrosha|loragrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:loragmusha|loragmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:loragyasha|loragyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goloragnkshÃḋsha|goloragnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goloragnkrosha|goloragnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goloragnkmusha|goloragnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goloragnkyasha|goloragnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:loraragasha|loraragasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:loraragshÃḋsha|loraragshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:loraragrosha|loraragrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:loraragmusha|loraragmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:loraragyasha|loraragyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goloraragnkshÃḋsha|goloraragnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goloraragnkrosha|goloraragnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goloraragnkmusha|goloraragnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goloraragnkyasha|goloraragnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:lerÃḊgasha|lerÃḊgasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lerÃḊgshÃḋsha|lerÃḊgshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lerÃḊgrosha|lerÃḊgrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lerÃḊgmusha|lerÃḊgmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lerÃḊgyasha|lerÃḊgyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golerÃḊgnkshÃḋsha|golerÃḊgnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golerÃḊgnkrosha|golerÃḊgnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golerÃḊgnkmusha|golerÃḊgnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golerÃḊgnkyasha|golerÃḊgnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:lorfagasha|lorfagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lorfagshÃḋsha|lorfagshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lorfagrosha|lorfagrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lorfagmusha|lorfagmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lorfagyasha|lorfagyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golorfagnkshÃḋsha|golorfagnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golorfagnkrosha|golorfagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golorfagnkmusha|golorfagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golorfagnkyasha|golorfagnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
